channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: FBI arrests Afghan man who officials say planned Election Day attack in the US
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The FBI has arrested an Afghan man who officials say was inspired by the Islamic State militant organization and was plotting an Election Day attack targeting large crowds in the U.S., the Justice Department said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden makes rare dip into battleground state fray with visits to Pennsylvania and Wisconsin
item.description: BRYN MAWR, Pa. (AP) — President Joe Biden made a rare jump into the 2024 political battleground fray since taking a step back after ending his reelection bid. He campaigned Tuesday in Pennsylvania for a close ally after having stopped in Wisconsin to spotlight a signature legislative achievement.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI and SCOTT BAUER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: As FEMA prepares for Hurricane Milton, it battles rumors surrounding Helene recovery
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The rumors surrounding Hurricane Helene are many. There are false claims that people taking federal relief money could see their land seized. Or that $750 is the most they will ever get to rebuild.
item.dc:creator: REBECCA SANTANA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Reporter's Notebook: With no government shutdown, it feels like Christmas in September
item.description: This spending bill funds the government through October, November and just before Christmas, setting up another showdown just before Christmas Eve.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cruz opponent Allred raises $30 million in 3 months
item.description: Rep. Colin Allred (D-Texas) announced Tuesday that he has raised more than $30 million over the past three months in his battle against incumbent Texas Sen. Ted Cruz (R), reflecting broad desire among Democratic donors to defeat one of the Senate’s most prominent conservatives.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: New poll shows Harris taking a slim lead over Trump thanks to support from a surprising group
item.description: Poll indicates increased support from Republicans is helping fuel Vice President Kamala Harris with 4 weeks to go until Election Day in her White House showdown with former President Trump
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Conservative senator lays out proposals for post-McConnell reforms
item.description: Sen. Mike Lee (R-Utah), the chair of the conservative Senate Steering Committee, has laid out a list of proposed reforms designed to ensure that the next Senate Republican leader does not have the same power as outgoing Senate GOP Leader Mitch McConnell (Ky.).
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: Trump campaign blasts Bob Woodward; denies secret Putin calls
item.description: Donald Trump's campaign is rejecting claims in Bob Woodward's new book 'War' about the former president holding secret calls with Vladimir Putin since leaving office.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, Fox 5

item.title: Woodward book reveals Trump's calls with Putin and Biden's private remarks on Obama and Netanyahu
item.description: Bob Woodward writes in his new book “War” that Donald Trump has had as many as seven private phone calls with Vladimir Putin since leaving office and that he secretly sent the Russian president COVID-19 test machines in 2020.
item.dc:creator: Michelle L. Price And Meg Kinnard, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Rafael Arroyo discusses wasteful spending, studio tax credits, and California's policies in Nevada
item.description: Rafael Arroyo, the Republican candidate running for Assembly District 41, joined Brian Loftis on the 8 News Now Daily Voting Guide, outlining his vision and priorities as the election approaches.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: GOP senator calls Trump special counsel filing 'a temper tantrum from a deranged fanatic'
item.description: Steven Cheung, a spokesperson for Trump, previously called Smith’s filing “falsehood-ridden” and “unconstitutional.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: The Plot to Kill Trump: Back to Butler
item.description: Former President Donald Trump returned to Butler, Pennsylvania, three months after surviving an assassination attempt.
item.dc:creator: Brian Entin, NewsNation

item.title: Hurricane Milton projected to reach Category 4 strength before landfall in Florida
item.description: A new storm is approaching the west coast of the Florida, threatening to inflict heavy rain, strong winds and flash flooding in the already-storm battered state.
item.dc:creator: Juliana Kim, MPR News

item.title: Ballots mailed out to registered voters for Presidential General Election
item.description: Registered voters in San Diego County will be receiving their ballots next week for the November Presidential General Election.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Politics Friday: Minnesota’s 2nd Congressional District debate
item.description: Minnesota’s 2nd Congressional District is one of the most closely watched races in the nation. MPR News politics editor Brian Bakst moderated a debate between Democratic Rep. Angie Craig and Republican candidate Joe Teirab on Friday, Oct. 4.
item.dc:creator: Brian Bakst, Matthew Alvarez, and Ellie Roth, MPR News

item.title: Politics over Humanity? How Hurricane Helene impacts the political field
item.description: Politics over Humanity? How Hurricane Helene impacts the Political field as the race to the White House is weeks away.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Volunteers open Harris-Walz campaign office in Gary
item.description: The Harris-Walz campaign on Thursday opened Indiana's first and only Democratic presidential campaign headquarters in Gary, celebrated with a "Kamala Karavan" of vehicles adorned with campaign decor.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Barnes, WGN 9

item.title: Hurricane Helene brings climate change to forefront of the presidential campaign
item.description: President Joe Biden has toured some of the areas hardest-hit by the storm this week as he and Vice President Kamala Harris traveled to different parts of the Southeast. Former President Trump was in Georgia on Monday and criticized the federal response.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Harris campaigns in Wisconsin and Trump in Michigan in battle for 'blue wall' states
item.description: Democratic presidential candidate Kamala Harris is opening a two-day stay in Wisconsin and Michigan, and Republican candidate Donald Trump will be in Michigan on Thursday as the two candidates grapple for wins in the “blue wall” battleground states, which also include Pennsylvania.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Voters in 13 states have less than a week to register. When is the deadline in Illinois?
item.description: The 2024 presidential election is fast approaching, and in some states, the voter registration deadline is as soon as this week.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Jackson, WGN 9

item.title: Walz on Tiananmen Square screw-up: 'I'm a knucklehead at times'
item.description: Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz (D), pressed at the vice presidential debate over false statements he made in which he said he was present during the Tiananmen Square protests in 1989, said: “I’m a knucklehead at times.
item.dc:creator: Ian Swanson, Fox 5

item.title: Trump calls new January 6th accusations 'pure election interference'
item.description: The former president spoke exclusively to NewsNation about the unsealing of documents related to his election interference case.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, Fox 5

item.title: Marquette poll has Harris over Trump in Wisconsin, but within margin of error
item.description: Marquette University professor Charles Franklin joined the WGN Evening News on Wednesday to break down the latest numbers from the law school's poll about the upcoming presidential election.
item.dc:creator: Ray Cortopassi, WGN 9

item.title: Here are some important election deadlines for the Las Vegas valley
item.description: LAS VEGAS (KLAS) -- Nevada voters have until Oct. 22 to register to vote should they want a mail-in ballot, and remember, in-person registration is available on Election Day.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: ACLU of Nevada attempts to stop purge of nearly 20,000 registered voters
item.description: LAS VEGAS (KLAS) -- The ACLU of Nevada intervened in a court action Wednesday, which attempts to stop the purging of nearly 20,000 registered voters weeks before the presidential election. On Sept.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Meet the candidates running for San Diego City Attorney
item.description: There are only two candidates in the running to become San Diego City Attorney after incumbent Mara Elliott ends her last term in office in December.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Harris backs striking port workers, knocks Trump
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris voiced her support Wednesday for striking port workers while bashing her rival former President Donald Trump after tens of thousands of longshoremen at ports along the East Coast and Gulf of Mexico walked off the job.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: CBS cuts mics of Vance, Walz during immigration argument
item.description: The sparring started when Brennan clarified for debate viewers that Springfield “does have a large number of Haitian migrants who have legal status, temporary protected status.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, Fox 5
